Package org.jscience.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml

package org.jscience.social.linguistics.loaders.tigerxml
Standard TigerXML loader for linguistic corpora.

This package provides a robust implementation of the TIGER-XML format (version 2.0), including support for hierarchical graph structures, feature declarations, and metadata.

Bridges to Linguistics Ontology: Use TigerBridge to convert the raw TigerXML structures into the core Sentence and Phrase models.

Since:
1.0
Version:
2.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AnnotationMetadata
    Metadata about the annotation specification in a TIGER-XML corpus.
    AnnotationMetadata.Feature
    A feature definition (e.g., POS, MORPH, CAT).
    Corpus
    Represents a linguistic corpus in TIGER-XML format.
    GraphNode
    Represents a node in the syntax tree, either a terminal node or a non-terminal node.
    NT
    Represents a non-terminal node in a syntax tree.
    Path
    Represents a path leading through the syntax tree that connects two nodes.
    Sentence
    Represents a sentence in a corpus.
    T
    Represents a terminal node in a syntax tree
    TigerBridge
    Bridge between TigerXML data structures and the JScience Linguistics ontology.
    TigerXMLReader
    Reader for TIGER-XML corpus files.
